mapper.sql: target_id AS "targetId", user_id AS "userId", company_nature AS "companyNature", company_scale AS "companyScale", location, salary_range AS "salaryRange", domains, positions, preferred_companies AS "preferredCompanies", notes, updated_at AS "updatedAt"

record_id AS "recordId", user_id AS "userId", company, city, company_nature AS "companyNature", company_scale AS "companyScale", position_name AS "positionName", salary_range AS "salaryRange", favorite_key AS "favoriteKey", business_direction AS "businessDirection", interview_round AS "interviewRound", interview_time AS "interviewTime", interview_content AS "interviewContent", interview_format AS "interviewFormat", result, reflection, job_description AS "jobDescription", interview_process AS "interviewProcess", next_action AS "nextAction", status, priority, tags_json AS "tagsJson", enabled, created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM journey_target WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO journey_target( user_id, company_nature, company_scale, location, salary_range, domains, positions, preferred_companies, notes, updated_at, target_id ) VALUES ( #{target.userId}, #{target.companyNature}, #{target.companyScale}, #{target.location}, #{target.salaryRange}, #{target.domains}, #{target.positions}, #{target.preferredCompanies}, #{target.notes}, #{updatedAt}, #{target.targetId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE journey_target SET user_id = #{target.userId}, company_nature = #{target.companyNature}, company_scale = #{target.companyScale}, location = #{target.location}, salary_range = #{target.salaryRange}, domains = #{target.domains}, positions = #{target.positions}, preferred_companies = #{target.preferredCompanies}, notes = #{target.notes}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE target_id = #{target.targetId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO journey_record( user_id, company, city, company_nature, company_scale, position_name, salary_range, favorite_key, business_direction, interview_round, interview_time, interview_content, interview_format, result, reflection, job_description, interview_process, next_action, status, priority, tags_json, enabled, updated_at, record_id ) VALUES ( #{record.userId}, #{record.company}, #{record.city}, #{record.companyNature}, #{record.companyScale}, #{record.positionName}, #{record.salaryRange}, #{record.favoriteKey}, #{record.businessDirection}, #{record.interviewRound}, #{record.interviewTime}, #{record.interviewContent}, #{record.interviewFormat}, #{record.result}, #{record.reflection}, #{record.jobDescription}, #{record.interviewProcess}, #{record.nextAction}, #{record.status}, #{record.priority}, #{tagsJson}, #{enabled}, #{updatedAt}, #{record.recordId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE journey_record SET user_id = #{record.userId}, company = #{record.company}, city = #{record.city}, company_nature = #{record.companyNature}, company_scale = #{record.companyScale}, position_name = #{record.positionName}, salary_range = #{record.salaryRange}, favorite_key = #{record.favoriteKey}, business_direction = #{record.businessDirection}, interview_round = #{record.interviewRound}, interview_time = #{record.interviewTime}, interview_content = #{record.interviewContent}, interview_format = #{record.interviewFormat}, result = #{record.result}, reflection = #{record.reflection}, job_description = #{record.jobDescription}, interview_process = #{record.interviewProcess}, next_action = #{record.nextAction}, status = #{record.status}, priority = #{record.priority}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE record_id = #{record.recordId}
